title: VoltCore 10000mAh PowerBank
description: Compact 10000mAh power bank with dual USB output, fast recharge support, and LED battery indicator.

title: Titan 20000mAh Fast Charge PowerBank
description: High-capacity power bank with USB-C PD output, pass-through charging, and travel-friendly design.

title: PocketMag Magnetic PowerBank
description: Slim magnetic wireless power bank built for daily top-ups with secure snap alignment and USB-C backup charging.

title: AirPulse True Wireless Earbuds
description: Noise-isolating earbuds with touch controls, deep bass tuning, and a pocket charging case.

title: Nimbus ANC Earbuds
description: Active-noise-cancelling earbuds with transparency mode, low-latency audio, and all-day comfort.

title: FitBeat Sport Earbuds
description: Sweat-resistant sport earbuds with secure ear fins, punchy sound, and quick pairing.

title: ChargePro 20W USB-C Adapter
description: Fast 20W wall adapter with compact foldable design for phones, earbuds, and small tablets.

title: MaxVolt 65W GaN Charger
description: Multi-device GaN charger with USB-C PD output and enough power for phones, tablets, and laptops.

title: DuoPort Car Charger
description: Reliable dual-port car charger with one USB-C fast charge port and one USB-A port for passengers.

title: TravelCube Universal Adapter
description: Universal travel adapter with interchangeable plugs and surge protection for international charging.

title: EchoLite Mini Earbuds
description: Lightweight daily earbuds with balanced sound, clear call microphones, and easy one-tap controls.

title: FlashCharge 30W USB-C Charger
description: Portable 30W charger with smart temperature control and rapid charging support for modern devices.
